# LEAP MCP Requirements
# Python 3.8-3.11 required (Python 3.13+ NOT supported due to Manim compatibility)

# Core MCP framework
fastmcp==2.2.0

# Animation engine
manim==0.19.0
manim-voiceover==0.3.7

# AI services
openai==1.101.0

# Audio and processing
pydub>=0.25.1
numpy>=1.24.0

# Additional utilities
python-dotenv>=0.19.0
tiktoken>=0.9.0
